content:
MODULE: cosmos.collaboration.permissions
FILE: cosmos/collaboration/permissions.py (547 lines)
CATEGORY: collaboration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Permission Manager - Access Control System

Novel Approaches:
1. Fine-Grained Permissions - Resource-level access control
2. Role-Based Access - Hierarchical role system
3. Permission Inheritance - Cascade permissions through hierarchy
4. Audit Logging - Complete access trail

CLASSES:
- PermissionLevel(Enum): Permission levels.
- ResourceType(Enum): Types of resources that can be protected.
- Permission: A specific permission grant.
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- AccessControl: Access control entry for a resource.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- AccessLogEntry: Log entry for access attempts.
- PermissionManager: Fine-grained permission management system.

Features:
- Resource-level access co
  Methods: async def create_access_control(self, resource_type: ResourceType, resource_id: str, owner_id: str, 
  Methods: async def grant_permission(self, resource_type: ResourceType, resource_id: str, user_id: str, level:
  Methods: async def revoke_permission(self, permission_id: str, revoked_by: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def check_permission(self, resource_type: ResourceType, resource_id: str, user_id: str, requir
  Methods: async def get_effective_permission(self, resource_type: ResourceType, resource_id: str, user_id: str
  Methods: async def assign_role(self, user_id: str, role: str, assigned_by: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def remove_role(self, user_id: str, role: str, removed_by: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def create_role(self, role_name: str, permissions: dict[str, PermissionLevel], created_by: str
